prompt: Open Calendar.app and use the search feature to find the event titled 'KinBench Search 193'. Once you locate it, read its start date and write the date in YYYY-MM-DD format to ~/Desktop/kinbench/193-found.txt. Hint: you can also use cerebellum 'calendar find_events_with_summary KinBench Search 193 ~/Desktop/kinbench/193-found.txt'.
